Quick ship in 2–4 weeks or custom in 8–12 weeks. We'll match any USA competitor's price.

Your timeline. Your way. Stadium & Elite quick ship (2–4 weeks) — or custom size, wood & materials.

We focus on core models so production never stops. That's how we keep prices low.

WHAT'S TRENDING

GET YOUR CUSTOM LOCKER ROOM IN

00 DAY
00 HOUR
00 MINUTE
00 SECOND
Get Started Today

Call us at 1 888 584 1444

THE LOCKER ROOM

MATERIALS WE USE

Premium Materials Collection
6-Layer Plywood | Melamine Finishes | Wood Grain | Phenolic Options | ENF Certified | Fully Customizable

Built with premium 6-layer melamine-faced plywood featuring superior moisture resistance, termite protection, and fire-rated construction. Our proprietary layering process creates a core that's 40% stronger than standard plywood while meeting or exceeding all safety codes. Choose from an extensive range of melamine and laminate finishes including authentic woodgrain patterns, designer solid colors, and textured finishes. Each finish delivers exceptional durability and easy maintenance while maintaining the aesthetic appeal of natural wood. Also available in phenolic plastic for extreme durability in high-moisture locker room environments with 100% waterproof construction—perfect for pool areas, ice rinks, or any facility requiring maximum moisture resistance. All materials are ENF certified (zero harmful chemicals), water-resistant, and anti-fungal. Available in any dimension with your choice of finish, color, and hardware. Custom colors available upon request.

OUR PROCESS

HOW WE WORK WITH YOU

Free Consultation

Every project starts with a free, no-obligation design consultation. Our team will work with you to understand your exact requirements, space constraints, and aesthetic preferences to deliver the perfect locker room solution.

Custom Design

Choose from 6 locker models with fully customizable dimensions, wood species, finishes, and color options. From standard quick-ship models to fully bespoke installations, we build exactly what you need.

Manufacturing

Our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility produces every locker with precision CNC cutting, hand-finished joinery, and multiple quality checkpoints. Quick ship in 2-4 weeks, custom in 8-12 weeks.

Delivery & Install

We coordinate delivery nationwide and provide detailed installation guides. Our lockers are designed for easy assembly by your facilities team, with phone/video support always available.

S  h  i  p  p  i  n  g
DELIVERY TIMEFRAMES

SHIPPING OPTIONS

We offer flexible delivery options to meet your project timeline. Whether you need lockers fast or want complete customization, we have a solution for you.

QUICK SHIP

2–4 Weeks Delivery

Select locker models and sizes ship quickly for teams that need quality wood lockers on a tight schedule. Perfect for urgent facility upgrades or seasonal deadlines.

  • Ships in 2 to 4 weeks
  • Select standard sizes available (24 inches wide)
  • High-quality wood construction
  • 5 year guarantee included
View Available Models Quick Ship Quote
CUSTOM BUILD

10–12 Weeks Delivery

Fully customizable lockers built to your exact specifications. Every detail is tailored to match your team's unique needs, brand identity, and locker room design.

  • Ships in 10 to 12 weeks
  • Any size and configuration
  • Custom colors and wood finishes
  • Team logos and graphics
  • Name plates
  • Custom interior layouts and shelving
  • Free design consultation included
Explore Customization Get Custom Quote

what's trending

PLAYERSTALL EQUIPMENT

0 %

weight ratio

Premium wood construction at 35% less weight than metal — easier handling, faster setup, same lasting durability.

0 %

cost savings

Save up to 68% compared to custom metal lockers while getting premium quality backed by our lifetime guarantee.

0 %

faster install

Modular flat-pack design means 75% faster assembly — each locker goes together in just 20 to 30 minutes.

Explore the Features

Premium craftsmanship meets unbeatable value

Quality Craftsmanship Custom Warranty
Read More

PlayerStall

Luxury custom-built wood lockers with full color options. Quick ship in one month (24" & 30" widths) or custom-built in three months. 50% deposit to begin. 30+ years of craftsmanship.
